questions: An insured travelling abroad (Imperial Plus plan, excluding USA) has a medical emergency in the USA during a 3-week business trip. Is the treatment covered?

answers.answer: The policy covers medical emergencies in the USA for the Imperial Plus plan, specifically considering the 'Excluding USA' cover option, up to the limit specified in the Policy Schedule. However, there is a 30-day waiting period for all claims under out-patient treatment, except those arising out of Accidental Injury.
answers.justification: Section 12 of the policy wordings states that emergency treatment outside the area of cover is covered if the 'Excluding USA' cover option is opted. However, Section C of the policy wordings states that there is a 30-day waiting period for all claims under out-patient treatment, except those arising out of Accidental Injury.
